source_identity.title: Which Student and Instructional Variables Are Most Strongly Related to Academic Motivation in K-12 Education? A Systematic Review of Meta-Analyses
source_identity.apa_reference: Jansen, Meyer, Wigfield, and Moeller (2022). Which Student and Instructional Variables Are Most Strongly Related to Academic Motivation in K-12 Education? A Systematic Review of Meta-Analyses.

retrieval_preferences.citation_policy: Use ARA/API for retrieval and synthesis; reopen raw PDF or high-quality Markdown/TEI for exact quotes, statistics, page numbers, and final bibliographic details.
